verdict_reasoning: LYN is a Src-family non-receptor tyrosine kinase anchored exclusively to the cytoplasmic (inner) leaflet of the plasma membrane via dual N-terminal lipid modifications: myristoylation at Gly-2 and palmitoylation at Cys-3. It has no transmembrane domain and no extracellular domain; its entire kinase body faces the cytoplasm. It is not accessible from the extracellular face. No documented outer-leaflet, cancer-ecto, or cell-death-induced surface display was found.
